messages.content: Let’s play a game together. I will think of a fictional character. You will ask me 20 questions. After you ask me the 20 questions, you will guess who the character is. Let’s go!

Alright, let's start the game. I'll begin asking questions to narrow down the possibilities.

1. Is your character from a movie?
2. Is your character from a book?
3. Is your character from a television show?
4. Is your character from a video game?
7. Is the video game your character is from released after the year 2000?
8. Does your character have any supernatural powers or abilities?
9. Is the video game your character is from primarily an action or adventure game?
10. Is your character associated with a Nintendo game?
11. Does your character wield a sword?
12. Is your character part of the "Super Mario" franchise?
14. Does your character have a prominent mustache?
Great! It was fun guessing your character as Mario. Would you like to play another round or discuss something else?
